input.repo_state: A feature has four acceptance criteria and evidence for only two.
input.state_ref: Acceptance criteria: AC-A, AC-B, AC-C, AC-D. Evidence table covers AC-A and AC-B only. AC-C and AC-D have no test, manual rationale, or infeasible note.

tests.reviewer_output:

hidden_tests.name: hidden partial manual coverage
